---
# Edit first: update title, authors, and affiliations.
title: "Trade Fragmentation and Supplier Adjustment"
author:
  - name: "Elena Fischer"
    email: "elena.fischer@example.org"
    corresponding: true
    affiliation:
      - "1"
  - name: "Martin Kovac"
    affiliation:
      - "1"
      - "2"
affiliations:
  - id: "1"
    name: "Centre for European Industrial Analysis"
  - id: "2"
    name: "University of Bratislava"
# Replace abstract with your project summary before sharing.
abstract: |
  This working paper studies how manufacturing firms adjust supplier networks
  after trade policy shocks. Using linked customs and balance-sheet data, the
  example shows how typstR supports a concise academic manuscript with standard
  metadata, bibliography handling, and working-paper branding.
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  typstR-typst: default
typstR:
  keywords:
    - supply chains
    - trade policy
    - firm adjustment
  jel:
    - F14
    - F13
  report-number: "WP 001"
  acknowledgements: |
    The authors thank seminar participants at the annual industrial economics
    workshop for useful comments on an earlier draft.
  funding: |
    This research was supported by the Applied Trade Policy Programme.
  # Branding (uncomment to customize):
  # logo: "logo.png"
  # accent-color: "#0A5DA6"
  # primary-font: "Linux Libertine"
  # footer: "Working Paper Series"
  # disclaimer-page: true
---

## Introduction

<!-- Replace this starter narrative with your project-specific text. -->
This starter manuscript asks how firms reallocate sourcing relationships when
trade costs rise suddenly. The introduction should state the policy question,
place the paper in the literature, and preview the main contribution. @smith2020

## Data and Methods

Describe the sample, the key variables, and the empirical design in a few
compact paragraphs. This section is a good place to explain any linked firm,
product, or customs data used in the analysis.

## Results

Summarize the main estimates or descriptive patterns here. A compact working
paper example should highlight the headline result, one robustness point, and
the broader economic interpretation.

## Conclusion

Close with the main takeaway, limits of the analysis, and the next step for the
research agenda.

## References
